visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young women sit behind a marble countertop. The woman on the left has long dark hair and wears a black top with a neck cutout, while the woman on the right wears a zebra-patterned bucket hat and a white t-shirt. They hold green and yellow rectangular gift boxes. The background is a warmly lit indoor living room with neutral walls. Large pink and yellow text overlays the center. (2) The scene cuts to an outdoor shot of a shop called 'Idodo'. A large black bear statue in a yellow vest stands near the glass entrance. A person enters the shop where a Christmas tree is visible. (3) Returning to the women, they open the gift boxes to show individually wrapped yellow packages. The woman in the hat holds one up to the camera. (4) A close-up shows a round, golden-brown pastry being sliced on a wooden board. Hands pull the halves apart to reveal a layered, moist citrus jam filling. The lighting is bright and focused on the food texture. (5) The women taste the pastries, showing joyful facial expressions and nodding. Confetti and star graphics appear around them. (6) A sequence of close-ups shows the lemon-shaped pastry and premium packaging, including a green shopping bag. The woman in the hat is later seen on a brown leather couch, eating while a small white dog sits beside her. (7) The women present a new product: a large lemon cream tart in a pink 'MIMIAN' box. The woman on the left holds a smartphone showing a website. They give thumbs-up gestures to the camera.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 台中最新必買伴手禮. [Logo]: 鴻鼎菓子. (2) [Subtitle]: 之前也有分享過的鴻鼎菓子. (3) [Subtitle]: 最新出的是熟成檸檬酥. (4) [Variety]: 三種檸檬. [Subtitle]: 全台原創秘醬熟成檸檬酥. (5) [Subtitle]: 塞滿整個內餡. (6) [Subtitle]: 七分酸三分甜. (7) [Subtitle]: 還吃得到淡淡檸檬皮的香氣. (8) [Variety]: 減糖減油配方的餅皮. [Subtitle]: 口感很酥綿還有奶香味. (9) [Subtitle]: 一不小心就會整顆不見. (10) [Variety]: 檸檬造型. [Subtitle]: 包裝袋也非常有質感. (11) [Subtitle]: 送禮自用都喜歡!. (12) [Subtitle]: 不愧是獲得2025年台中十大伴手禮首獎的好滋味. (13) [Subtitle]: 喜歡鳳梨酥但總是覺得太甜不夠酸的人更要試試看喔. (14) [Variety]: ☀️. [Subtitle]: 在這炎熱的夏天經過溫暖的台中不要錯過熟成檸檬酥. (15) [Subtitle]: 也可以網購喔!. (16) [Variety]: 瞇瞇眼. [Subtitle]: 還有同店面瞇瞇眼真檸檬全生乳波士頓派也超讚喔.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main creators in the foreground, 1 female passer-by entering the shop in the background
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two young women; one with long dark hair in a black cutout top, the other in a zebra-patterned bucket hat and white t-shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern indoor living room with a marble table and orange leather couch; an outdoor retail storefront with a bear statue and glass doors.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) An enthusiastic female narrator speaks in a high-pitched, fast-paced Mandarin tone. The background music is an upbeat electronic pop track with a strong 4/4 beat at 124 BPM. The recording is studio-clean with no background noise. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect triggers during a scene transition while the narration maintains high energy. The music remains a consistent high-energy backdrop. (3) A distinct crunchy thud sound effect occurs as the pastry is sliced, followed by a subtle metallic click. The narrator's tone remains cheerful and informative. (4) Several bright 'sparkle' and 'ding' sound effects with high spectral brightness are layered over the mix to highlight product features. Speech density is very high with almost no pauses. (5) A 'pop' sound effect occurs, coinciding with the appearance of star graphics. The narrator's vocal arousal remains high through the end of the clip. (6) The music ends with a final melodic flourish and a bell-like 'ding', providing a clean conclusion to the promotional content.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Product Feature Showcase -> Award Credibility -> Secondary Product Upsell -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote 'Idodo' (鴻鼎菓子) lemon pastries as a top-tier gift choice from Taichung by showcasing their award-winning status, unique flavor profile, and appealing packaging through an energetic lifestyle review.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of product packaging, brand mentions in subtitles, and call to action for online purchasing.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical short-form social media editing styles, including high-contrast text and bright audio cues to maintain viewer engagement.
